market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: 2‑min walk to NEC – Luxury Suite for 4
Luxury Suite Near NEC – Walk 2 mins, High‑End
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your exclusive, all‑private home just two minutes’ walk from the NEC. This upscale, fully‑equipped suite comfortably accommodates up to four guests, making it perfect for families or small groups seeking a premium stay in the heart of the city. Guests enjoy a spacious living‑area, a modern bedroom with high‑quality linens, and a sleek bathroom stocked with essentials. With a nightly rate of £353.60, you receive a level of luxury that far exceeds the local median of £154.60. 

Our property has earned a strong 4.81 rating from 216 satisfied travelers, reflecting consistent cleanliness, comfort, and attentive service. Although Calum is a new host, the flawless condition of the home and its prime location ensure a memorable experience. Over the next 90 days, the calendar shows a 56.5% occupancy rate, leaving 39 open nights ready for new guests. 

Whether you’re attending an event at the NEC, exploring the city, or simply relaxing in a high‑end setting, this suite offers the perfect blend of convenience and elegance. Book now to enjoy a luxurious base just steps from the exhibition centre, with all the comforts of home and the prestige of a premium address.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑staged shot of the main living/bedroom area as the cover photo—it showcases the luxury feel and immediately signals the premium experience to guests.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £353.6 (129% above the market median of £154.6) to around £180‑£200 to align price with demand and boost occupancy.
Correct the title to reflect the true capacity (4 guests) and highlight the 2‑minute walk to the NEC, eliminating the misleading "6‑Person Suite" claim.
Add and prominently list high‑value amenities—outdoor space, parking, and entertainment—to match guest expectations and improve the amenities score.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your suite commands £353/night— 129% above the market median—yet occupancy sits at only 56.5%, leaving clear room to capture more bookings with a price tweak.
